rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §28.0062, which governs phonics-based reading instruction standards for kindergarten through third grade. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 28.0062. READING STANDARDS FOR KINDERGARTEN THROUGH THIRD GRADE.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text addresses early literacy curriculum requirements and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts.
